calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: R. BALIAN

MICHELLE LEU ZACCONE, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) ROSS L. GRAVES,
Plaintiff's Witness: ROSS L. GRAVES was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) PARADISE VALLEY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION for Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
